original: Need support without the hassle over covering up the swell-happy expanse of your breasts? Look no further than the lycra undervest! Coming in colors all the way from day-glow orange to neon ultraviolet, this garment helps keep your belly looking tight while lifting and exposing everything you'd want to show the galaxy.
